summary:
Lane HC-002: Dynamic Menu Actions — Complete

Created 5 new files and modified 2 files in packages/desktop/src/main/ to replace the monolithic hardcoded DESKTOP_MENU and 18-branch switch with a feature-module-based MenuActionRegistry.

New files:
- menu-action-registry.ts — Core MenuActionRegistry class with add(), on(), build(), execute(), clear(). Exports singleton menuRegistry.
- menu-app.ts — macOS app menu section and handlers (app.checkForUpdates, app.relaunch). Accepts AppMenuDeps.
- menu-file.ts — File menu section + github.createPullRequest warning handler (was a silent no-op).
- menu-view-window.ts — Edit, View, Go, Window menus + 17 action handlers (all webContents/window operations).
- menu-help.ts — Help menu section (all href/command-based, no action handlers needed).

Modified files:
- menu.ts — Builds from MenuActionRegistry instead of importing DESKTOP_MENU. Calls register*MenuActions() functions. Action dispatch uses menuRegistry.execute().
- desktop-menu-actions.ts — Replaced 85-line switch with 10-line thin forwarder to registry. Removed DesktopMenuActionHandlers type and setZoom function (moved to menu-view-window.ts).

Pattern: Each feature module exports register*MenuActions(registry, deps?) — matching the IPC decomposition pattern from HC-001. The @opencode-ai/app/desktop-menu types are preserved for the Windows React menu (windows-app-menu.tsx).

Verification: Typecheck passes with zero new errors. 91/92 tests pass (1 pre-existing failure in shell-env.test.ts).
